problem id: feef2d98
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  01011100 -> 10000000
  10000011 -> 00000000
  00100110 -> 01000000
  11111000 -> 10000000
  11000001 -> 00000000
  11111110 -> 11100000
  00011011 -> 00110000
  11101000 -> 10000000
  01010100 -> 00000000
  00101111 -> 01010000

query: 00010000
predicted answer: 00000000
